allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\(''''log'''',''''''''\) or d.get\(''''stderr'''',''''''''\) or str\(d\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); log=d.get\(''''stdout'''',''''''''\)+d.get\(''''stderr'''',''''''''\); [print\(l\) for l in log.split\(''''\\n''''\) if any\(k in l.lower\(\) for k in [''''import'''',''''error'''',''''exception'''',''''fail'''',''''transaction'''']\)]")
